leadText: Plus (Japanese: プラス Plus) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature Ability of Plusle.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III and IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] Plus powers up with Minus . When a Pokémon with Plus enters into a Double Battle with a Pokémon with the Ability Minus, the user's Special Attack stat is increased by 50%. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Plus enters a battle and has an ally with Plus or Minus , the Special Attack stat of the Pokémon with Plus is increased by 50%. The move Magnetic Flux raises the Defense and Special Defense of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage, while the move Gear Up raises the Attack and Special Attack of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Plus has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III and IV [ edit | edit source ] Plus powers up with Minus . When a Pokémon with Plus enters into a Double Battle with a Pokémon with the Ability Minus, the user's Special Attack stat is increased by 50%. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Plus enters a battle and has an ally with Plus or Minus , the Special Attack stat of the Pokémon with Plus is increased by 50%. The move Magnetic Flux raises the Defense and Special Defense of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage, while the move Gear Up raises the Attack and Special Attack of allied Pokémon with Plus or Minus by 1 stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Special Attack if there is a Pokémon with the Minus ability. MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's Special Attack when a Pokémon with the Minus ability is nearby. B S L マイナスの とくせいの ポケモンがいると とくこうがあがる MD GtI Raises Special Attack when an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is nearby. * If a teammate in the same room has the Plus or Minus Ability, the Pokémon's Special Attack will go up! * S MD If a teammate in the same room has the Plus or Minus Ability, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk goes up! MD RT DX If a teammate in the same room has the Plus or Minus Ability, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk goes up.
